cutoff_basis: common event interval anchor order; no gt in assignment
pilot_label_inspection_disclosure: Positive-event counts were inspected during Gate 0 feasibility. All five windows are now retained; none may be removed based on labels or performance.
dependence_rule: Expanding test windows overlap. Report each separately; do not pool them or treat them as independent replicates.
cross_frequency_rule: Use identical calendar cutoffs and the intersection event set. AP remains prevalence-sensitive and is not directly compared across frequencies.
